## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and documented user-facing behavior.
- [ ] I updated README/docs/examples when behavior changed.
- [ ] I considered security impacts for file, shell, network, and credential access.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets, local `.pi/` state, generated reports, package tarballs, or machine-local paths.
